sub_modules.fft64_sign_extend: Combinational complex input sign-extension from DATA_W to internal/output width.
sub_modules.fft64_twiddle_rom: Combinational 64-entry Q1.15 FFT twiddle-factor lookup table.
sub_modules.fft64_complex_mult: Combinational fixed-point complex multiplier for data-by-twiddle multiplication.
sub_modules.fft64_butterfly: Combinational radix-style complex butterfly add/subtract unit.
sub_modules.fft64_output_clip: Combinational output width formatter used for final complex output assignment.
